case_title: CORVERAS TOWING VS. CHRISTOPHER DAVID BOSE

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CORVERAS TOWING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORVERAS TOWING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00 SERVED JUN-28-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOSE, CHRISTOPHER DAVID
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CORVERAS TOWING AS TO DEFENDANT BOSE, CHRISTOPHER DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE HOWARD CORVERAS, OWNER OF CORVERAS TOWING, AND DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER DAVID BOSE. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 7/14/16, BUT SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. SUBSTITUTE SERVICE EXECUTED ON JUNE 28, 2016 ON DEFENDANT WHO RESIDES IN REDWOOD CITY, CA. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORVERAS TOWING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSE, CHRISTOPHER DAVID $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
